## 📰 Latest News on Acme Corp (Acme United Corporation)

Here are the most recent headlines:

1. **Acme United to Release Q2 2026 Financial Results on July 23, 2026** — Just two days from now! Q2 results drop July 23 at 6:30 AM ET, with a conference call at noon ET. 2. **Acme United Gets New $65 Million Syndicated Loan Facility** — Recent financing news for the company.

3. **Acme United Board Approves Cash Dividend** — Payable on July 23, 2026. ([StockTitan](https://www.stocktitan.net/news/ACU/acme-united-to-release-second-quarter-2026-financial-results-on-july-3c24rlfd7ot8.html))

4. **Acme United Q1 2026 Results** — Net sales of **$52.3M**, up **14% YoY** from $46.0M. Strong growth driven by recent acquisitions. ([Acme United IR](https://acmeunited.gcs-web.com/news-releases/news-release-details/acme-united-reports-first-quarter-2026-financial-results))

**Key takeaway for your meeting:** Acme United is releasing Q2 earnings **this Thursday July 23** — it would be timely to ask about their Q2 performance and the $65M new loan facility during your meeting.
